responsibilities: Coordinate daily shipment scheduling activities and ensure timely movement of goods between suppliers, warehouses, and customer locations.
Monitor transportation activities through tracking systems and proactively resolve delivery delays, exceptions, and service disruptions.
Collaborate with carriers, warehouse teams, and suppliers to maintain accurate shipment documentation and logistics records.
Manage order fulfillment workflows by coordinating inventory availability, transportation capacity, and customer delivery requirements.
Prepare logistics reports tracking shipment status, delivery performance, and operational metrics for management review.
Support transportation procurement activities by communicating with carriers and maintaining freight rate and service information.
Ensure compliance with shipping procedures, transportation regulations, and customer-specific logistics requirements across operations.
Respond to logistics inquiries and coordinate issue resolution to maintain high levels of customer satisfaction and service quality.
